messages.content: rough week man. not sleeping great
whats going on
idk just one of those weeks where my brain wont shut off
been up since like 4 every night
dude i saw ur strava
4am run?? thats insane
lol yeah
couldnt sleep so i just went
u good tho
yeah its just stress. work stuff
lot going on rn
i get it
come climb tmrw
nothing like getting pumped on a 5.11 to reset ur brain
lol thats not how sleep works
trust me bro 💪
what time
10ish? ill be there by 945
k ill try to make it
yo the store is live
redrockrigs.myshopify.com
LETS GO 🔥
dude this looks sick
im sending this to everyone i know
lol hold on dont go crazy with it
nah bro trust me u need the exposure
just sent ur link to like 6 ppl from my IT group
my buddy mike is definately gonna order
nice what did u tell them
just that u build custom rigs and its legit
relax 😂
dude ur first order just hit 🔥
mike just told me lol
bro i know i literally just saw it
650 gaming rig
lets gooooo 💪
gotta order parts tmrw
u got this man
ur first sale bro thats huge 🤙
bro im so broke rn
lol same
whens that stripe payout hit
was supposed to be today or tmrw. nothing yet
that sucks
u got another build coming in tho right
maybe. been slow
holiday season coming dude itll pick up 🔥
stripe payout got delayed
wtf why
idk some processing thing. says 1-2 business days
thats annoying
yeah whatever. itll come thru
u climbing sat morning?
hell yeah 🤙 ill be there 7am
nice were camping at red rock so ill just come from the campsite
wait ur camping out there?
yeah with harper and sloane. fri thru sun
sick can i come for the morning
yeah thats the plan. meet us at the calico basin lot?
done. ill bring coffee
bro what do u want to do for your bday? outdoor session at red rock?
dude yes
been wanting to hit calico basin
bet. saturday morning?
perfect
early tho i wanna get on rock before it gets packed
830 work?
cool then we grab dinner after. my treat
bro u dont gotta do that
its ur birthday dude shut up
lol ok
dinner at distill on charleston?
perfect yea
omw
same. parking lot by visitor center?
yep
that second pitch was insane 😂
ur face when u slipped lmao
i didnt slip i was testing teh hold
sure u were
good pick on distill
told u man
solid day 🔥
happy birthday dude, yesterday was sick 🤙
thanks man 🙌
best bday in a while tbh
we gotta make it a tradition
down. same spot next year
bro seriously dont tag me
on that reddit post
what post
the one in r/buildapc where u linked my store
oh lol that was just tryna help
i know but my boss cant see this stuff
if cheryl finds out im done
ok ok ill take it down
chill 😂
im serious
done. removed it
but u should still think about getting the word out more
word of mouth only. no public stuff
alright alright
bro internet is down
had an order i needed to check
lol that sucks
cox?
yeah whole area outage
use ur hotspot
tried. shopify wont load
just do it tmrw
yeah guess so
itll be fine
bro
just saw ur year in review on strava
beast mode bro 🔥 those 5am runs are insane
312 activities??
do u ever take a day off
lol thanks man
october was crazy
earliest start 348am tho
what are u doing at 348am 😂
couldnt sleep so i just went out
whats the damage at sparrow
thats either dedication or insomnia
little of both tbh
1247 miles is insane dude
u should do an ultra or somethign
idk maybe a relay or something
do it 💪
hey
need a restaurant rec for harpers birthday
next saturday
somewhere nice but not crazy expensive
oh nice 🔥
happy bday harper
how much u tryna spend
like maybe 100 for both of us
maybe a lil more idk
ok lemme think
ill hit u up tmrw with some spots
ok so
esthers kitchen in the arts district
its realy good. italian stuff but not stuffy
also sparrow + wolf on spring mountain
or edo tapas if she liles small plates
esthers sounds perfect actually
shes been wanting to try that place
dude its so good. get the dutch baby for dessert 🤙
bet. gonna make a reservation rn
lmk how it goes
dude
dinner was perfect, she loved it. thanks for the rec
lets gooo 🔥
did u get the dutch baby
yeah it was insane
whole night was great. she cried when she opend the gift lol
haha what u get her
le creuset dutch oven
the big one
bro thats like 200 bucks
180. worth it
ur a good husband man 😂
dude
trevor wants to swap weeks AGAIN
lol what
hes got some work trip to reno and cant take sloane next week
so u guys just keep her?
yep
harper says i cant text him directly but im so done
bro dont text that dude
nothing good comes from that
i know i know
also gotta move our climbing sesh
wait what
the 25th??
yeah. feb 1 instead. same time
ugh ok
still bringing sloane?
yeah she was pumped about it
ok feb 1 9am 🤙
need restaurant ideas for v-day, nothing crazy expensive tho
bro u just asked me this 😂
lol cant do esthers again
sparrow + wolf on spring mountain
or honey salt in summerlin
like 80-100 for two
get the pork belly app trust me 🔥
bet. making a rez
how was vday
sparrow was so good dude. pork belly was insane
told u 🔥
bro she wants every saturday through march
who cheryl?
yeah mandatory coverage for spring sports
thats brutal
and sloanes got tournament games every saturday too
oh noooo 😂
its not funny dude
sorry lol
can u switch with jake or something
maybe idk. harpers stressed about it too
bro u down for climbing tuesday
dude my allergies are so bad rn
lol already?
its march bro
vegas is trying to kill me
take some benadryl and man up 💪
harpers got me on zyrtec. maybe next week
yo im feeling way better. climbing this week?
finally 🤙
thursday evening? like 6?
dude i posted about red rock rigs on the spring valley nextdoor group. got like 15 likes already lol

also my buddy at work does the company newsletter and hes looking for local small business spotlights. i told him about you. he wants to do like a little profile piece, your name and the shopify link and everything
free advertising bro 💪 youre welcome
Don't forget Sloane's game is at 9 tomorrow
yeah desert breeze right
Yep Field 3. Coach Diane said arrive by 8:30
ok ill take her. you coming?
Of course! Its our turn for team snacks btw
oh crap i forgot about that
I already got orange slices and capri suns from Walmart 😊
ur the best
She needs her shin guards. Did you see them? I think they're in the garage
yeah theyre by the camping stuff. ill grab em
Also her jersey is in the dryer
got it. first game of the season lets go
Hey, got the conference schedule from the school today. Sloane's time is Thursday at 4 with Mrs. Ruiz. Trevor and I will both be there
wish i could go
I know. But you know how it works with Trevor there
yeah i know
I'll tell you everything after, promise
thanks babe
Hey, just got out of the conference
Sloane's doing great. Mrs. Ruiz said she talks about climbing with you all the time 😬
wait what
Yeah she mentioned Red Rock and everything. Said Sloane told the whole class about climbing rocks
was trevor there when she said that
No he had already left by then. It was during my one on one time with her
ok good
But she said Sloane brings it up in class too. During sharing time and stuff
thats not great
I know. I'm going to talk to Sloane about keeping some of our activities more private
yeah maybe just the climbing stuff stays between us
Other than that her grades are great and she's reading above grade level. Mrs. Ruiz was really positive
nice. glad shes doing good
She is ❤️ Mrs. Ruiz is going to send me some reading recommendations to keep her challenged
Hey are we doing anything for dinner?
idk what do u want
I was thinking Raising Canes? Sloane has been asking all week
actually lets just do something at home tonight
Oh ok. I think we have chicken in the freezer
yeah ill make that stir fry thing
The one with the bell peppers? Sloane loved that last time
yeah that one. got rice too
hey lets just cook this week, save a little
Yeah that's fine with me. We could do a big grocery run and meal prep
yeah exactly. got rice and stuff already. ill grab chicken from smiths tmrw
Sounds good. Are you ok? You seem a little off today
no im good just trying to be smarter with money
I'm with you on that. Love you ❤️
love u too
hey so we still doing red rock next weekend right
Yes! I checked and they still have spots. Did you ever make the reservation though?
uh
Daniel.
ill do it rn
You had one job lol
ok booked site 23. fri thru sun
Good. We need to figure out food. I can do a Smith's run Thursday night
cool ill make a list
Also Sloane wants to roast marshmallows so get the big ones from Walmart. And the skewers are in the garage somewhere
on it
grabbing chicken and veggies from smiths on the way home. need anything
Can you get milk? And those flour tortillas Sloane likes
k
Hey I found the sleeping bags but Sloane's is kind of small for her now. Should we get a new one?
how much are they
REI has junior ones for like $60. Or Summit probably has one right?
yeah i think we have some on clearance ill check tmrw
Perfect. Can you also grab a new headlamp? Mine died
got sloanes sleeping bag from the store. and a headlamp
Nice work. Did you figure out the food list?
hotdogs burgers buns, marshmallows graham crackers chocolate, eggs bacon for sat morning, water jugs, trail mix, apples oranges
Add coffee. And I'll bring the camp stove from the garage. Can you check if we have enough propane?
propane tanks good. packing the car now
Ok I just got back from Smith's. Got everything plus extra water just in case
perfect
Sloane told her class about the climbing 😬
oh no. how much detail
enough. I'll handle it
what did she say exactly
She was telling her friends she climbed rocks with Daniel at Red Rock. Mrs. Ruiz asked her about it during sharing time
did any of the other parents hear
I don't know. I'm going to call Mrs. Ruiz and just make sure it doesn't become a thing
ok yeah good idea
It'll be fine. Just maybe we don't mention it at school pickup for a while
yeah got it
She had the best time though. Kept talking about it all morning ❤️
hey did pixel ever get his checkup this year
No I totally forgot. He's due for shots too
we should probly do it before the end of the year
I'll look up Desert Paws and see when they have openings
cool
Ok I just checked their website. They have spots next week Monday through Thursday
can u take him or do u need me to
Depends on the day. Let me check my schedule at the office and I'll let you know
Ok so about the vet. I have patients all day Monday and Wednesday is a cleaning block
what about monday morning before my shift
You'd have to be there by like 8 and they don't open until 9
oh right
Can you do Monday the 8th? You're on mid shift that day right?
yeah dont go in til 11 i can take him in the morning
Perfect. I'll call tomorrow and book 10:30
sounds good
He's going to hate that carrier lol
hes gonna scream the whole drive
Last time he bit the vet tech 😂
lol that was on them they grabed him weird
Make sure you bring his vaccine card. It should be in the kitchen drawer
Shipped that order today 📦
thanks babe
was that the prints or the build
The print bundle to that Sarah person
perfect
I used the bubble wrap from the Newegg box btw
smart
When does the money from all these orders actually hit the bank?
stripe does payouts every couple weeks
last one hit a few days ago
Ok nice. Its going straight to savings right?
yep
Sloane scored her first goal! ⚽
She's BEAMING
Did you see her face??
YES i was right there
she looked at me after and did the fist pump lol
I got it on video!
send it
Its shaky because I was screaming haha
haha thats fine im so proud of her
Coach Diane gave her the game ball ❤️
she deserves it. been working so hard at practice
She keeps asking if we can get ice cream to celebrate 😊
hey what does sloane want for christmas
She's been talking about art supplies nonstop. The nice kind, not the Walmart pack
like what specifically
Crayola colored pencils (the big 120 set), a sketch pad, and those watercolor markers she saw at Target
ok cool thats doable
garrett is easy. gaming headset
What about Cheryl?
book. she reads like 3 mystery novels a week
Good call. And Marcus?
suns beanie. dude is obsessed
Love it. Staying on budget too 👍
What about me? 👀
nice try
heading to desert paws w pixel rn. hes screaming
all done. that was 185 btw
How did it go?
good. shots and checkup done. vet said hes healthy
Good boy Pixel 🐱
he bit the tech again lol
Of course he did 😂
internet just went out
i need to check a shopify order tonight
Ugh is it just us or the whole building?
checking cox app
whole area. says service outage detected
Great. Right when you need it
trying my hotspot but its so slow
Can you check the order from your phone?
shopify app keeps timing out on hotspot
forget it ill do it tmrw at work
I got an email from Cox. Service disruption in our area, they said they're working on it
yeah saw it
Called Cox this morning. They can send someone tomorrow between 2 and 4
works for me. you gonna be home?
Yeah I have a short day tomorrow so I'll be home by 1
perfect thanks babe
Cox guy is here. He's working on the box outside
nice how long did he say
He said there was a bad connection to our unit. Fixed it, testing now
It's back!
finally
thank you for dealing with that
No problem 👍 Go check your orders when you get home
all gifts wrapped except yours 😉
Ooh exciting! Where are you hiding them?
like im gonna tell u
I already found the art supplies 😂
WHAT
where
Kidding!! Your face would be priceless right now
u are the worst
Love you too ❤️
You really ran that much this year? Wow, babe
haha yeah i was kinda surprised too
1,247 miles! I'm proud of you ❤️
thanks babe
But 3:48 am? When was that?
just one time i couldnt sleep so i went for a run
Are you sleeping okay? It feels like you've been getting up really early a lot lately
yeah im fine. i just like the quiet
Okay just checking
i promise im good
Garrett commented on your Strava thing. He called you beast mode 😂
lol yeah he texted me about it
October was your biggest month? That makes sense, you were out every single morning
its good stress relief
I know. Just remember you have a wife and a cat who like having you around in the morning 😊
pixel doesnt care
Pixel follows you around the apartment and you know it
ok fair
Love you. Get some sleep tonight please
love u too
hey did u see that email from the leasing office
The rent increase? Yes I saw it.
50 bucks more each
thats 975 a month for each of us
I know. It's not great but I was kind of expecting it. Everything around here is going up.
yeah
i was looking at zillow during lunch
And?
everything comparable is like 2000-2100 for a 2br
and thats before move in costs and deposit
Yeah that's what I figured. Plus Sloane is settled at her school and I really don't want to deal with moving right now.
same
location works for both our commutes too
I think we should just renew. The $50 isn't nothing but it's doable.
agreed
Can we sit down and look at the budget before you reply though? I want to make sure it all works with everything else.
yeah good call. when
Next Wednesday night after Sloane goes to bed?
works. ill put it on the calendar
Thanks babe ❤️
Hey babe, Trevor just texted me. He wants to swap next week
He has a work trip to Reno and can't take Sloane
are you kidding me
when does he leave
The 27th. Gets back Feb 2nd. He's asking us to keep her through until the 4th
so we just dont get a break
I know it's a lot. But he actually asked with notice this time
ok so if we keep sloane the extra week i gotta figure out pickups
I can do Monday and Wednesday. You'd need to cover Tuesday Thursday and Friday
tuesday and thursday shes got soccer til like 5
Right so you'd get her from practice those days not school
i was gonna coach those anyway
wait what about sunday
What about it?
climbing with garrett and sloane. weve had it planned for 2 weeks
You can still do that, we have her this week already
yeah but if i have all those extra pickups next week im gonna need sunday to get organized
maybe ill just move climbing to feb 1
That works. I just don't want to say no to Trevor when he's actually trying to coordinate ahead of time for once
for once lol
You know what I mean
yeah fine well make it work
i looked at trevors number for like 5 min just now
almost texted him
Daniel
i didnt. relax
I know it's frustrating but every time you go around me it gets worse with him
i just hate that he changes plans and we rearrange our whole life around it
I hear you. But we have Sloane and she's happy. That's what matters right now
yeah
I'll confirm the swap tonight. He drops her at school Monday like normal and we pick her up through the 4th
Hey babe, have you thought about what we're doing with the tax refund this year? We should probably start getting our stuff together
not yet
I was thinking we could put some toward that Zion trip we talked about and then the rest into savings
yeah maybe
Can you look at everything this weekend? Like where we are with the cards and savings and figure out what makes sense
let me look at everything this weekend
Ok sounds good. Did you keep the H&R Block login from last year? We should probably use them again
i think so ill check
Also I want to get Sloane new cleats before spring season starts. Hers are falling apart
yeah we can do that
Love you ❤️
hey keep saturday night free
For Valentine's? 😊
yeah its a surprise tho
Love it! Do I need to dress up?
a little yeah
reservation is at 730 leave by 7?
Sounds good! Almost ready ❤️
That was so good. Happy Valentine's Day ❤️
happy vday babe
So Sloane already has ideas for the science fair
what is she thinking
Baking soda volcano obviously 😂
lol of course
I told her everyone does the volcano. She doesn't care
honestly its fine shes 8 let her have fun with it
Mrs Ruiz said they just need a display board and the experiment
i can help her build it this week
That would be amazing. She'll love doing it with you
we need baking soda vinegar food coloring
And a tray so it doesn't destroy the kitchen 😊
good call ill grab stuff from walmart tmrw
You're the best ❤️
Hey so Trevor texted me. He wants to swap his week in early March for a work trip to Reno
He's asking to take Sloane Feb 25 through Mar 4 instead of his normal week
seriously
that messes up everything
I know. His work trip is March 2 through 6
so we'd get her back mar 4
No. He'd want to swap back. We get her Feb 25 to Mar 4, then he gets Mar 8 to 18
Ok so if we do the swap we at least have her for the March 7 game
yeah but cheryl has me working all 3 saturdays
Did she say anything about your request?
she said no
Can you call in on the 7th?
maybe but shes already told me to plan on being there
These games matter to her Daniel
i know that
Sorry. I know you know
Should we do our taxes this weekend? I want to know what our refund looks like
yeah maybe. i got my w2 from adp the other day
nah just that. thanks babe
Me too. I already downloaded mine from Desert Springs
nice
Should we use TurboTax again?
yeah turbotax is fine
Ok. We claimed Sloane last year right? We can do that again?
yeah she was with us more than half the year so were good
I think were getting a decent refund. Saturday morning while Sloanes at Trevors?
actually i need to figure out the shop income stuff first. theres a 1099 from stripe
Oh right. Is that complicated?
kinda. i gotta pull together all the reciepts for parts and shipping for deductions
Ok that makes sense. Can you get that done this week?
yeah ill work on it
Ok dont put it off. I really want to know about the refund ❤️
i wont
what if i try to get out early on the 7th
Games start at 9. You'd miss it
yeah
I can take her to all three. You come when you can
thats not the point
check out your daughter
she painted the whole volcano red and orange
Oh my gosh 😍 that looks so good
Is that food coloring all over the counter
......maybe
It better come off
itll come off. probably
She looks so proud of it though
she wants to do a practice eruption tonight
Record it for me!!
i almost just texted him. dont worry i didnt
Thank you. Please let me handle Trevor
I told him we can do the swap. He needs her back by Wednesday the 4th
k
Hey so did you ever pull together the tax stuff? We were supposed to do it this weekend
still figuring out some deduction stuff. ill finish it this week
Daniel thats what you said two weeks ago
i know. work has been nuts with the spring push
We need to file before April 15. Can we at least sit down next Saturday?
yeah next saturday for sure
Im holding you to that
i promise
babe my allergies are killing me today
Already? Its so early this year
the wind was insane at work. couldnt stop sneezing on the floor
Did you take anything?
no i dont think we have any zyrtec left
I'll check when I get home
dude my eyes are so swollen
Oh no are you still at work?
can you grab zyrtec on the way home? im dying out here
Already on my list. CVS or Walgreens?
doesnt matter. generic is fine
Ok getting the big bottle. You go through it every spring 😊
lol youre not wrong
Also grabbing tissues. We're almost out
ur the best
Anything else?
On my way now. Be home in 20 ❤️
ok the zyrtec is starting to kick in i think
Good! Give it a couple days to really work. And take it every morning, you always forget
Hey so Trevor just texted me. Sloane apparently told him she went climbing mountains with Daniel last weekend and he's asking questions. What should I tell him?
He seemed kind of annoyed. Like he wants specifics about what activities she's been doing with us

Also completely separate thing but I was looking at the Wells Fargo savings and its still at like $580. I thought the Shopify money was going there? We've been selling stuff for months babe. Where is it all going?
Can we sit down this weekend and actually go through everything? I need to understand what our finances look like for real
Hey bro
How's everything going, financially I mean. Proud of you for turning things around after that whole mess
hey man yeah its getting better
just grinding it out
That's good to hear man. You still working with that credit lady?
yeah lisa shes been helpful
Good good. Harper must be relieved too right?
yeah were doing ok
Dude that's awesome. Hey I might come out in March for the Suns game if I can get tix. You down?
hell yeah lmk
Will do. Give Harper and Sloane a hug from me
will do. later bro

Hey bro, random thing. My coworker Tony has been going through some stuff and I was telling him how you turned everything around after the betting. He was really inspired honestly. Would it be cool if I gave him your number? I think you could really help him out
Also Harper should know what a good dude she married lol. Tell her I said that
Hey man you good for opening tmrw?
yeah should be fine
cool. cheryl moved the vendor delivery to 8am fyi
got it thanks
hey man heads up i had to run the opening checklist again today. not a big deal but cheryl was in early and asked where you were. told her you were grabbing something from your car lol
also random question. are you danielT_redrocks on strava? my roommates running buddy followed you and said you crush those 5am red rock canyon runs. thats insane dude
Store alarm triggered 20 min ago. Are you available to check?
On my way
hey sloane left her soccer cleats at our place. want me to drop them off
Talk to Harper about it.
hi coach diane this is daniel, harpers husband. just confirming i can help with practice tuesday
Sounds great! See you at 4:30. Thanks Daniel!
Yo D! Saw youre in Vegas now. Im in town for a conference next month, we should grab a beer
oh man what. yeah def lets do it
Sick ill text you when i know my schedule
hey man i think amazon left one of your packages at my door. brown box?
oh yeah thats probably mine. ill grab it thanks
no prob
did anyone else lose power on the 2nd floor?
yeah we did too. 3rd floor
ugh same. i called NV Energy they said 2 hours
great
back on for us now
happy hour friday? thinking about that new place on sahara
im in
maybe
cmon dude
lol
calico tanks saturday 6am anyone?
im down
same
nice. parking lot at 545
see u there
Reminder: You have an appointment at Desert Springs Dental on 1/22 at 2:00 PM. Reply Y to confirm or call (702) 555-2180 to reschedule.
Y
internet has been out for 3 hours
We apologize for the inconvenience. There is a service outage in your area. Estimated restoration: 9:00 PM PST.
ok

Wells Fargo: A direct deposit of $1,560.00 has posted to your account ending in 4291.
Hey Daniel long time no talk. Hope you and Harper are doing good. We should catch up sometime
dude that 5.11a on the far wall is brutal
right? i almost sent it yesterday but my foot slipped on the crux
yeah that hold is garbage. you going wednesday?
probably
Hi Daniel! Your cat was meowing really loud this morning, is everything ok?
oh sorry about that. he gets vocal when were out of wet food. wont happen again
UPS: Your package is out for delivery today, arriving by 7:00 PM. Track at ups.com
Petco: Earn 2X Pals Rewards points on all cat food this week! Shop in-store or at petco.com. Reply STOP to unsubscribe.
